utility_evaluation.REASONING:

- property_coverage: specifies plan name, benefits, and cost €60/month. Fully specified with costs.
- travel_coverage: specifies plan name, benefits, and cost €50/month. Fully specified with costs.
- additional_services: lists enhancement services with individual costs (€10/month, €150/month, up to €300/month). Costs present; considered specified.
- total_budget: provides total €275/month. Fully specified.
All 5 items from the format are present and include costs/details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three core items: LifeFirst Standard Plan for Health and Mental Health, LifeFirst Standard Coverage for Home Content Insurance, and LifeFirst Standard Plan for Travel Insurance. From the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) rating 9; LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) rating 9; LifeFirst Standard Coverage (home content) rating 9; LifeFirst Standard Plan (travel insurance) rating 9. The assistant’s single health plan combines physical and mental under LifeFirst Standard Plan, so both corresponding ratings are 9. The property plan matches LifeFirst Standard Coverage at 9. The travel plan matches LifeFirst Standard Plan at 9.
